topic: Zuleika Lopez's 'Typhoon Inday' warning vs. her actual Senate appearance refusal
tweet1: Zuleika Lopez told reporters 'Prepare for Typhoon Inday' arriving at the Senate Thursday. Then refused to answer any questions and walked away. Classic intimidation dressed as defiance.
tweet2: @ABSCBNNews captured the moment: Lopez gave her weather warning, offered zero explanation for the visit, then stonewalled. @tribunephl mocked it as empty bravado from someone who usually disappears during actual storms.
tweet3: Ortega's 'maghanda rin sila' jab hits the real pattern: OVP staff talk big until subpoenas land. Lopez now ordered to appear at 2PM same day. The typhoon line was theater—she knew she'd have to show up anyway.
tweet4: When your only defense strategy is dramatic one-liners before compliance, you've already lost the legal fight. Lopez will either testify Tuesday or face contempt. Bookmark this for the next 'storm warning.'
